title: Hospital Inventory Optimization Under Demand Uncertainty
description: Comparative study of deterministic, stochastic, and reinforcement learning strategies for healthcare inventory planning.
findings: Initial analysis suggests up to ~2% cost reduction with policy tuning while preserving resilience under demand volatility.

title: Multi-Knowledge Representation for coding LLMs
description: Researching CLIP-style contrastive alignment of two views of the same function for code generation and understanding.
